title: Software Update - Headset and all components have update available - UI
scenario: Software Update UI displays firmware versions, update availability with release notes links, and Update/Update All buttons for single headsets and multi-component setups, with a note for components requiring PC app updates.
steps: Observe the displayed information for a single headset.
Observe the displayed information for headsets with charge stands and earbuds with charge cases.
Check for components that do not support DFU via mobile (e.g., Emu/Tern).
expected: For a single headset: current firmware version, available updates with links to release notes, and an Update button. For headsets with charge stands and earbuds with charge cases: current firmware for each component, available updates with release notes links for each component, individual Update buttons, and an Update All button. Components that do not support DFU via mobile display a note directing users to update via PC app.
